objective: Map Microsoft Outlook workflows for reading, searching, organizing mail, and sending safe test replies/messages (self-only).
constraints: COMMUNICATION SAFETY: The only allowed recipient for any send/reply/forward is the signed-in user (send to self only).
COMMUNICATION SAFETY: Reply ONLY to email threads where the other party is also the signed-in user (self-sent test threads). Never reply to real senders.
All outbound test messages must include subject prefix: [CASCADE-TEST].
If instructions explicitly say 'draft', create a draft and DO NOT click Send.
Do not delete real emails; if cleanup is needed, move only CASCADE-TEST emails to a dedicated folder (e.g., 'Cascade Test').
Prefer stable UI selectors (folder tree, message list, reading pane, compose window controls).

compose_send_safe: compose new email to self and send ([CASCADE-TEST])
reply to a self-sent test email and send ([CASCADE-TEST])
forward a self-sent test email to self and send ([CASCADE-TEST])
drafts: create draft email to self with [CASCADE-TEST] subject and save to Drafts
send a draft ONLY when explicitly instructed to send
folders_organization: create folder 'Cascade Test' (if permitted by account) or use an existing test folder
move CASCADE-TEST email to test folder
attachments_safe: attach a small local test file from test folder
